final:
module dram_cell (
    input wire d,
    input wire we,
    input wire clk,
    output reg q
);
    reg stored_bit;

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (we) begin
            stored_bit <= d;
        end
    end

    always @* begin
        q = stored_bit;
    end
endmodule
